50:
That's right, <Emphasis>dragons</Emphasis>! Two of them, with great big wings and fire in their eyes. I ran straight home at the sight of them. My memory's a bit hazy, but if it really <Emphasis>was</Emphasis> dragons I seen, we could all be in danger. I can't very well go back there by myself, but, well...
I almost hate to ask, but do you think you could traipse on over to the ruins for me? I'll mark down the area I was wanderin' around in on your map.

53:
You're back! Did you see the dragons?
...Statues, you say!? Ugh, maybe I should go easier on the ale...

You're back! Did you see the dragons?
...Statues, you say!? Ugh, maybe I should go easier on the ale...
